Looks like Strava has changed everyone's settings for Fly-By to 'opt-out' by default - 
If you want to re-enable, go to Settings > Privacy Controls > Flyby - to adjust.

Sad you didn't get to race all season? Now you can, for free! 
Self-directed individual time trial, All-day, Friday, October 9. Ride one hot-lap of the Mystic Lakes.  

A friendly group will meet at 5:30pm (Kimball Rd @ Mystic Street) but all times logged throughout the day will be posted. Feel free to do as many laps as you choose and your best time will be considered. If it's successful, I can see it becoming a weekly event. Do review the specific segment that will count toward the leaderboard and remember: SAFETY FIRST. 

Please see this  CRW event page for more details and to confirm your participation. 
This is not a sanctioned, insured, or sponsored event. Good luck!

Post Summary: Monday afternoon group ride from Alewife
Post:
Casual no-leader fitness oriented ride leaving from Alewife on Mondays 5:15PM . For anyone looking for a safer small but friendly group I'd encourage you to check it out. 
Avg speed around 18-20 mph on a rolling 21 mile loop out to Lincoln and back. 

https://www.strava.com/clubs/155/group_events/793623

Biggest difference in 2019 was far many more miles running than previous years, almost as many hours spent running as on the bike, which is crazy!

https://2019.strava.com?utm_source=strava_post&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=yis2019
